title: EHC Checker Rule Set Schema
description: Generic schema for EHC Checker rule sets. Any new certificate type (EHC 8468, EHC 8322, China meat, India dairy, etc.) should follow this structure. The rule set metadata lives in a JSON file that references an external markdown source file containing the full rule text.

id.description: Unique identifier for the rule set. Use snake_case. Examples: ehc_8468, ehc_8322, china_pork, india_dairy, nz_honey

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI dropdown. Example: 'EHC 8468 — Dairy products for human consumption'

version.description: Semantic version of this specific rule set. Incremented when the rule set source or libraries are updated. Example: '1.5.0'

certificate_type.description: The regulatory certificate model code. Example: '8468', '8322', 'CN-MEAT-001'

applies_to.description: Export routes this rule set applies to. Format: 'ORIGIN → DESTINATION'

source_file.description: Relative path to the markdown file containing the full rule set text. This file is the authoritative source that Claude reads when checking certificates. Example: '_source/rule_set_v1_5.md'

libraries.description: References to shared library files. Libraries are structured JSON files for data that needs to be edited through the admin panel (consignees, establishments, BCPs, OVs).

consignees.description: Relative path to consignees library. Example: 'libraries/consignees.json'

establishments.description: Relative path to establishments library. Example: 'libraries/establishments.json'

bcps.description: Relative path to BCPs library. Example: 'libraries/bcps.json'

ovs.description: Relative path to OVs library. Example: 'libraries/ovs.json'

metadata.description: Additional metadata for display and filtering

original_author.description: Original author credit for the rule set content

last_updated.description: Date of last update in YYYY-MM-DD format

rule_set_owner.description: Current maintainer of the rule set

example.name: EHC 8468 — Dairy products for human consumption (DAIRY-PRODUCTS-PT)

metadata.notes: Covers UK dairy exports to EU for human consumption requiring pasteurisation treatment. Shares source file with EHC 8322 (both types are documented in the same combined rule set).
